ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, scout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the player */,
  "potential" INTEGER /* Potential rating of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* Player image URL */,
  "player_profile_url" TEXT /* Player profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "team_image_url" TEXT /* Team image URL */,
  "team_profile_url" TEXT /* Team profile URL */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Team stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Team stadium capacity */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_image_url" TEXT /* League image URL */,
  "league_profile_url" TEXT /* League profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing for the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped playing for the team */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* Transfer fee for the player */,
  "contract_duration" INTEGER /* Contract duration for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Referee of the match */,
  "match_stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals the player scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists the player made */,
  "player_match_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player in the match */,
  "player_match_position" TEXT /* Position played by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, scout)
Number of hits made by the player
Country where the team is based
Country where the league is based
Unique identifier for each player-team association
Date the player started playing for the team
